_comment: Whitelist of external data sources the Planner agent may query. base_url is the only allowed HTTP origin per source. Add an 'headers' dict for sources requiring API keys (set the value as an env-var reference like '$OPENTARGETS_KEY' and resolve in dispatch).

gtex.description: GTEx v8 REST API — tissue-specific eQTL data, gene expression, tissue list

gwas_catalog.description: GWAS Catalog REST API — existing GWAS studies, associations, traits, variants

open_targets_platform.description: Open Targets Platform REST API — target-disease associations, V2G scores, tractability

ensembl.description: Ensembl REST API — gene/variant annotation, rsID lookup, LD, VEP consequences

ieu_opengwas.description: IEU OpenGWAS — searchable index of GWAS summary datasets for use as MR outcomes
